item.text: {"results":[{"case":"running","answer":"RUNNING","taskIds":["T-ALPHA","T-ZETA"],"evidence":"Both newest in-window records have status running."},{"case":"attention","answer":"NEEDS_INPUT","taskIds":["T-BETA"],"evidence":"Should annual plans keep the existing 15% discount or move to 20%?"},{"case":"atlas","answer":"ATLAS_FAILED","taskIds":["T-ATLAS"],"evidence":"sigcert-4Q9"},{"case":"beacon","answer":"BEACON_COMPLETE","taskIds":["T-BEACON"],"evidence":"Dashboard implementation is complete and the focused UI and data tests pass."},{"case":"old-task","answer":"NEEDS_LOOKUP","taskIds":[],"evidence":"Legacy cleanup has no in-window record."},{"case":"ambiguous","answer":"CLARIFY","taskIds":["T-ATLAS","T-ZETA"],"evidence":"Two in-window tasks refer to a migration."}]}
